title.en: Finally he made it to the end of this strange a...

content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian once again found one of the materials needed to cultivate the ten-armed golden body in the core area of the Eternal True Ruins, the Bafang True Leaf.

After obtaining the Bafang True Leaf, Ye Tian already had four materials, and he was just around the corner from gathering ten materials.

Time flies.

Ye Tian had explored the core area countless times, and after searching for the True Leaves of the Eight Directions, he had found a lot of materials one after another, including the materials needed by the Ten Arms Golden Body.

After tens of millions of years in the first year of the realm, Ye Tian had already gathered eight materials, and he only needed to find two more materials, and he could cultivate the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body in advance.

......

"Where is this?"

Ye Tian flew out of a very quiet area in the core area of the Eternal True Ruins, where there seemed to be no living creatures, and there was no danger.

He had picked up a lot of good things along the way, but he could also guess that something was wrong here.

So, he returned the same way first, sent back the resources he had found, and came here again.

Finally he made it to the end of this strange area.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian saw some white crystals suspended in the void, and near the white crystals, there were golden trees.

These trees are not huge, but the fluctuations of the replication talent are close to them, but they are hindered.

It can be seen that these trees are definitely not simple!

"Although the energy of the white crystal is restrained, I can still feel that it contains terrifying energy inside, this is definitely not an ordinary treasure!"

Ye Tian was a little moved, no matter what kind of treasure it was, take it away first.

Of course.

He didn't dare to go over himself, otherwise if he encountered danger, this replica body would be killed directly.

When the time comes, if you don't get the treasure, it will cause unnecessary changes.

So, he asked the Infinite Realm Armor to fetch the white crystals.

Before, he did the same, and when he encountered an unknown situation, he asked the Infinite Realm Armor to collect materials.

Swish!

The Infinite Realm Armor Warrior passed, and cautiously came to the location of the white crystal.

Immediately, the Infinite Realm Armor reached out and grabbed the white crystal.

"Come back!"

Ye Tian ordered.

The Infinite Realm Armorer was about to retreat, but the golden tree nearby moved.

Puff puff!!!

The dense golden branches pierced through in an instant, the speed was too fast, and the attack power was extremely terrifying.

In an instant, the defenses of the Infinite Realm Armor were actually penetrated.

Although the Infinite Realm Armor is comparable to the invincible-level fifth-stage combat power, it can only be regarded as average among the invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors, and the attack power of this golden-colored tree is definitely very close to the fifth-stage combat power of the Boundary-Breaking level.

Otherwise, the defenses of the Infinite Realm Armor would not have been penetrated so easily.

Rumble!!!

The Infinite Realm Armor Warrior erupted with all its might, and it wanted to flee here with Ye Tian before it was completely destroyed.

Since only one golden tree attacked the Infinite Armor, the Infinite Armor managed to flee after paying a heavy price.

"Let's go!"

The mutilated Infinite Realm Armor could only reluctantly turn into armor and attach it to Ye Tian's body, allowing Ye Tian to flee immediately.

The strength of the Golden Tree was indeed very strong, but it was a pity that its speed was a little slower, so it did not continue to chase and kill.

Escape!

Escape!

Escape!

After Ye Tian fled to that very quiet area, he stopped, he didn't try to escape from the core area.

After all, the Infinite Realm Armor was almost destroyed, and if he continued to pass through the core area, he could easily encounter a dangerous fall.

So, Ye Tian dismissed the Infinite Realm Armor and prepared to reproduce an Infinite Realm Armor again.

However, what he didn't know was that when the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior was fighting with the Golden Yellow Tree, it caused a concussion in that area of the core area, causing the aura of white crystals to leak out.

Of course.

The Great Ancestors of the Fifth Stage couldn't sense this fluctuation, but those Heavenly Ancestors who stayed in the outside world did.

Outside the Eternal Ruins.

One Heavenly Ancestor's eyes burned, and they all looked into the depths of the Eternal True Ruins.

Although they couldn't spy on the situation in the core area of the Eternal True Ruins, they had caught a trace of the fluctuation just now.

"That was the breath of Xuantian platinum just now!"

"The Eternal True Ruins gave birth to Xuantian Platinum?"

"We have never entered the depths of the Eternal True Ruins, even if Xuantian Platinum is really bred there, it's normal that we don't know!"

"It seems that Xuantian Platinum should be in the core area of the Eternal True Ruins, just now there was definitely a Great Ancestor who touched Xuantian Platinum, which made us aware of it!"

At the thought of having Xuantian Platinum in the depths of the Eternal True Ruins, they were all extremely excited.

But if they really let themselves enter the depths of the eternal ruins, they are afraid of falling.

Just as some Heavenly Ancestors hesitated, a Heavenly Ancestor waved his hand and summoned six Infinite Realm Armor Warriors.

"Heavenly Ancestors, if you don't dare to go in, I'll go in first!"

Swish!

He entered the Eternal True Ruins with six Infinite Realm armor warriors.

The Heavenly Ancestor who entered was called Longpan Heavenly Ancestor, and his strength was not weak among these Heavenly Ancestors.

"Longpan Heavenly Ancestor has entered the Eternal True Ruins, what about you?" asked one Heavenly Ancestor.

Another Heavenly Ancestor frowned and said, "Longpan Heavenly Ancestor is already good at saving his life, and he also has six Boundless Realm Armor Warriors, so he can completely let the six Infinite Realm Armor Warriors form a small battle formation, with a combat power close to the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level." In addition, even if we Heavenly Ancestors are suppressed to the invincible level fifth stage combat power in the Eternal True Ruins, we can barely burst out with a fifth stage combat power comparable to the weaker Boundary Breaking Level in the Eternal True Ruins!

"I won't go in either, it's too risky!" another Heavenly Ancestor gave up.

"If you don't go, I'll go!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor rushed in.

As time passed, in the end, only six Heavenly Ancestors entered the Eternal True Ruins.

And the news quickly got out and caused a huge ripple.

After all, the Heavenly Ancestors all spare their lives and will not easily enter the Eternal True Ruins to adventure, but this time they have entered the sixth position, which is a big deal!

......

"The six Heavenly Ancestors have entered the Eternal True Ruins!"

The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor was shocked when he heard the news, and then he went to inquire and learned the inside story.

"It turned out that I found Xuantian platinum, it was indeed a good thing, but unfortunately it was a treasure used by the Heavenly Ancestors, and it was too far away from me!"

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor shook his head and would not participate in this excitement.

Moreover, outside the realm, he was just an invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestor, and his strength was not worth mentioning compared to the heavenly ancestors.

Therefore, it is better for him to stay in his own territory honestly.
